hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀；【WORLD】“不再安全”：巴勒斯坦人警告约旦河西岸定居者暴力活动扩大；【FINANCE】人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁。

items.title: Fed's Goolsbee says he's worried about inflation in 'fraught but intense' climate
items.summary: In a CNBC interview, the central banker said policymaking is difficult in the current environment.
items.title_zh: 美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀
items.summary_zh: 这位央行行长在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，在当前环境下制定政策很困难。

items.title: 'There's no safety anymore': Palestinians warn of expanding West Bank settler violence
items.summary: There has been a surge of attacks by Israeli settlers on Palestinian villages across the occupied territory since the start of the Iran war.
items.title_zh: “不再安全”：巴勒斯坦人警告约旦河西岸定居者暴力活动扩大
items.summary_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，以色列定居者对被占领土上巴勒斯坦村庄的袭击激增。

items.title: The research firm whose AI paper knocked the whole stock market is out with another big call
items.summary: Citrini Research said persistently high energy prices risk weighing on consumers and corporate earnings, creating a tough backdrop for equities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁
items.summary_zh: Citrini Research 表示，持续居高不下的能源价格可能会给消费者和企业盈利带来压力，给股市带来艰难的背景。

items.title: UK political crypto donations banned by Starmer government
items.summary: The government halted crypto political donations over concerns about foreign interference, as the Rycroft review warns that anonymity risks undermine democratic transparency.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默政府禁止英国政治加密货币捐赠
items.summary_zh: 出于对外国干涉的担忧，政府停止了加密货币政治捐款，因为莱克罗夫特的审查警告称，匿名风险会破坏民主透明度。

items.title: Tom Lee’s Bitmine debuts MAVAN Ethereum staking platform, plans to shift its ETH activity
items.summary: Bitmine officially launched the MAVAN Ethereum staking platform, targeting roughly $300 million in annual rewards.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 推出 MAVAN 以太坊质押平台，计划转移其 ETH 活动
items.summary_zh: Bitmine正式推出MAVAN以太坊质押平台，目标年度奖励约为3亿美元。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Dismisses Trump’s Cease-Fire Offer but Signals Openness to Talks
items.summary: The Pentagon is sending more troops to the region even as President Trump seemed to endorse Pakistan’s offer to broker negotiations.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：德黑兰拒绝特朗普的停火提议，但表示对谈判持开放态度
items.summary_zh: 尽管特朗普总统似乎支持巴基斯坦调解谈判的提议，但五角大楼仍在向该地区派遣更多部队。

items.title: World has 'never experienced' soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanné on the Iran war, the $1 billion deal with the White House, investment in the U.S., and more.
items.title_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官告诉 CNBC，世界“从未经历过”如此飙升的炼油利润
items.summary_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官 Patrick Pouyanné 谈论伊朗战争、与白宫达成的 10 亿美元协议、对美国的投资等。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙表示，从长远来看，伊朗战争使中东和平前景更好
items.summary_zh: 在与伊朗的战争爆发几周后，摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙对中东和平发表了乐观的看法。

items.title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
items.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.
items.title_zh: Apollo 仅向投资者提供 150 亿美元私人信贷基金提款请求的 45%
items.summary_zh: 这些撤资表明，由于对向软件公司提供私人信贷的担忧，阿波罗并没有避免困扰竞争对手的投资者赎回潮。

items.title: Volume in stock and oil futures surged minutes before Trump's market-turning post
items.summary: The timing of the earlier volume spikes — across both equities and crude — caught the attention of traders.
items.title_zh: 在特朗普发表扭转市场的言论前几分钟，股票和石油期货成交量激增
items.summary_zh: 股票和原油早期成交量飙升的时机引起了交易员的注意。

items.title: BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns against market timing, says missing best days can halve returns
items.summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink said staying invested through periods of turmoil has historically delivered far stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的拉里·芬克 (Larry Fink) 对市场时机发出警告，称错过最佳时机可能会使回报减半
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德首席执行官拉里·芬克表示，从历史上看，在动荡时期保持投资会带来更强劲的回报。

items.title: Cheap Drones Remain Wild Card in Iran war
items.summary: Stopping Iran’s production of drones is critical to opening the Strait of Hormuz and halting its attacks on Gulf nations. But can it be done?
items.title_zh: 廉价无人机仍然是伊朗战争的不确定因素
items.summary_zh: 停止伊朗生产无人机对于开放霍尔木兹海峡并停止其对海湾国家的袭击至关重要。但能做到吗？

items.title: Sarah Mullally, the First Female Archbishop of Canterbury, Is Enthroned
items.summary: Sarah Mullally was installed on Wednesday at Canterbury Cathedral. Her appointment to the role has been both celebrated and denounced by some factions within the global Anglican Church.
items.title_zh: 坎特伯雷第一位女大主教莎拉·穆拉利登基
items.summary_zh: 莎拉·穆拉利于周三在坎特伯雷大教堂就职。她的任命受到了全球英国圣公会内部一些派系的赞扬和谴责。

items.title: U.S. and Iran Are Talking About Ways to End the War: What to Know
items.summary: The United States is discussing ways to end hostilities with Iran, even as President Trump continues to threaten attacks and as the Pentagon dispatches more troops.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗正在讨论结束战争的方法：需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 尽管特朗普总统继续威胁发动袭击并且五角大楼派遣了更多军队，但美国正在讨论结束与伊朗敌对行动的方法。

items.title: Sky-backed Obex spreads $1 billion across credit, energy and AI assets to expand stablecoin yield
items.summary: The stablecoin incubator is targeting tokenized assets tied to AI hardware, energy and housing to move Sky’s ecosystem beyond "circular" crypto yields.
items.title_zh: Sky 支持的 Obex 在信贷、能源和人工智能资产上投资 10 亿美元，以扩大稳定币收益率
items.summary_zh: 该稳定币孵化器的目标是与人工智能硬件、能源和住房相关的代币化资产，以使 Sky 的生态系统超越“循环”加密货币收益率。

items.title: The Protocol: Ethereum faces make-or-break moment as scaling, quantum and AI pressures mount
items.summary: Plus: Solana developer platform, Balancer Labs to shut down and Bitcoin mining concentration triggers small reorg.
items.title_zh: 协议：随着扩展、量子和人工智能压力的增加，以太坊面临着成败时刻
items.summary_zh: 另外：Solana 开发者平台、Balancer Labs 关闭以及比特币挖矿集中度引发小规模重组。

items.title: Binance tightens market maker rules, tells token issuers they must disclose partners
items.summary: The guidelines ban profit-sharing and guaranteed return arrangements, aiming to prevent conflicts of interest and manipulative trading.
items.title_zh: 币安收紧做市商规则，告诉代币发行人必须披露合作伙伴
items.summary_zh: 该指导方针禁止利润分享和保证回报安排，旨在防止利益冲突和操纵交易。

items.title: Circle selloff may be overdone as crypto bill weakens Coinbase edge, say analysts
items.summary: The latest draft of the CLARITY Act hit both stocks, but one analyst says the bill could ultimately shift bargaining power toward Circle and away from Coinbase.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，随着加密货币法案削弱 Coinbase 优势，Circle 抛售可能过度
items.summary_zh: 最新的 CLARITY 法案草案对这两只股票都造成了打击，但一位分析师表示，该法案最终可能会将议价能力从 Coinbase 转移到 Circle 身上。

items.title: Bitwise sees Circle worth $75 billion by 2030 as analysts defend stock after selloff
items.summary: Circle shares fell about 20% on Tuesday amid reports that draft provisions in the CLARITY Act could limit rewards.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 预计 Circle 到 2030 年价值将达到 750 亿美元，分析师在抛售后捍卫其股票
items.summary_zh: 据报道，CLARITY 法案中的草案条款可能会限制奖励，Circle 股价周二下跌约 20%。

items.title: Bitcoin consolidation points to potential market bottom as selling pressure wanes, K33 says
items.summary: Head of Research Vetle Lunde said subdued derivatives activity and limited inflows point to a cautious market, but one forming a bottom.
items.title_zh: K33 表示，随着抛售压力减弱，比特币整合指向潜在的市场底部
items.summary_zh: 研究主管Vetle Lunde表示，衍生品活动低迷和资金流入有限表明市场谨慎，但市场正在形成底部。

items.title: Beyond dollarization? Visa and Dune report finds non-USD stablecoins increasingly being used as money
items.summary: The supply of non-USD stablecoins hit $1.1 billion in February, while aggregated transfer volume surged over 1,600%.
items.title_zh: 超越美元化？ Visa 和 Dune 报告发现非美元稳定币越来越多地被用作货币
items.summary_zh: 2 月份非美元稳定币的供应量达到 11 亿美元，总转账量激增超过 1,600%。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #33.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 33 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #46.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 46 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #105.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 105。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Rain (RAIN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #26.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：雨 (RAIN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 26 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Monad (MON)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #142.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Monad (MON)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 142 位。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日星期一 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！评估利基另类 ETF 的逆转潜力 [Quantpedia] 另类 ETF 位于酒吧的一个不寻常的交叉点

items.title: Solana bets on AI agents: Foundation says network is becoming core infrastructure for ‘agentic’ internet
items.summary: This shift could fundamentally reshape internet business models, Solana Foundation's Vibhu Norby believes.
items.title_zh: Solana 押注人工智能代理：基金会称网络正在成为“代理”互联网的核心基础设施
items.summary_zh: Solana 基金会的 Vibhu Norby 认为，这种转变可能会从根本上重塑互联网商业模式。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation prepares for quantum threat with new cryptography roadmap
items.summary: The effort to protect Ethereum from quantum computing threats has been underway for eight years and is now producing working code.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会通过新的加密路线图为量子威胁做好准备
items.summary_zh: 保护以太坊免受量子计算威胁的努力已经进行了八年，现在正在生成工作代码。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) gains 6% as all constituents rise
items.summary: Aave (AAVE), up 5.8% from Tuesday, joined Stellar (XLM) as a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：随着所有成分股上涨，Stellar (XLM) 上涨 6%
items.summary_zh: Aave (AAVE) 较周二上涨 5.8%，与 Stellar (XLM) 一起成为表现最佳的股票。

items.title: Bitget Wallet debuts stablecoin payments infrastructure integrating with Ripple, Mastercard, Tether, and others
items.summary: Bitget Wallet launched the Onchain Payments Matrix, connecting Ripple, Mastercard, and Tether within a global stablecoin payments network.
items.title_zh: Bitget Wallet 首次推出与 Ripple、Mastercard、Tether 等集成的稳定币支付基础设施
items.summary_zh: Bitget Wallet 推出了链上支付矩阵，将 Ripple、Mastercard 和 Tether 连接到全球稳定币支付网络中。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: A better method for identifying overconfident large language models
items.summary: This new metric for measuring uncertainty could flag hallucinations and help users know whether to trust an AI model.
items.title_zh: 识别过度自信的大型语言模型的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 这种测量不确定性的新指标可以标记幻觉，并帮助用户知道是否信任人工智能模型。

items.title: MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab seed to signal: Amplifying early-career faculty impact
items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM Watson AI 实验室种子信号：扩大早期职业教师的影响力
items.summary_zh: 学术界与工业界的关系是早期加速器，支持专业进步和研究。

items.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
items.summary: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席杰伊·克莱顿表示，监管机构将在特朗普上任之前审查交易
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席克莱顿表示：“在任何公告之前，监管机构都会关注任何此类举措。”

items.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
items.summary: The move by Moody's is the latest sign of distress in private credit; retail investors have been rushing to withdraw funds, from Blackstone to Apollo.
items.title_zh: 由于不良贷款增加，穆迪将 KKR 和未来标准运营的私人信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级
items.summary_zh: 穆迪此举是私人信贷陷入困境的最新迹象。散户投资者纷纷撤资，从黑石到阿波罗。

items.title: U.S. executives, from Apple to Eli Lilly, revamp their push into the world's second-largest economy at the China Development Forum
items.summary: More than 80 global executives traveled to Beijing this weekend for the state-organized China Development Forum.
items.title_zh: 从苹果公司到礼来公司等美国高管在中国发展高层论坛上调整了进军世界第二大经济体的计划
items.summary_zh: 本周末，80 多名全球高管前往北京参加国家组织的中国发展论坛。

items.title: Ghana demands compensation for slavery in landmark UN vote
items.summary: Nations will vote on whether to designate the slave trade as "the gravest crime against humanity".
items.title_zh: 加纳在具有里程碑意义的联合国投票中要求对奴隶制进行赔偿
items.summary_zh: 各国将投票决定是否将奴隶贸易定为“最严重的危害人类罪”。

items.title: Democrats flip Florida state seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
items.summary: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.
items.title_zh: 民主党推翻了佛罗里达州席位，其中包括特朗普的海湖庄园
items.summary_zh: 艾米丽·格雷戈里 (Emily Gregory) 预计将在一个立法选区获胜，共和党候选人将在 2024 年以 19 个百分点的优势获胜。

items.title: 'Men need to be perp-walked' after Epstein files release, US Congressman Massie tells BBC
items.summary: The US congressman responded to a BBC Newsnight interview with a group of survivors of the late financier's abuse.
items.title_zh: 美国国会议员马西告诉英国广播公司，爱泼斯坦文件获释后，“男人需要被带走”
items.summary_zh: 这位美国国会议员回应了英国广播公司新闻之夜对已故金融家虐待事件幸存者的采访。

items.title: Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church
items.summary: D'Artagnan was killed during the Siege of Maastricht in 1673 and later immortalised in the stories of Alexandre Dumas.
items.title_zh: 据信在荷兰教堂下发现了火枪手达达尼昂的遗骸
items.summary_zh: 达达尼昂在 1673 年马斯特里赫特围城战中阵亡，后来在大仲马的故事中永垂不朽。

items.title: 'We are in agony' - Savannah Guthrie does first interview since mum's disappearance
items.summary: The US presenter says terrifying thoughts wake her at night as she imagines what happened.
items.title_zh: “我们处于痛苦之中”——萨凡纳·格思里（Savannah Guthrie）在妈妈失踪后首次接受采访
items.summary_zh: 这位美国主持人说，当她想象发生的事情时，可怕的想法让她在晚上醒来。

items.title: Marcos promises 'flow of oil' as Philippines declares energy emergency
items.summary: The President says the country will procure one million barrels of oil to add to the current stock.
items.title_zh: 菲律宾宣布能源紧急状态时，马科斯承诺“石油供应”
items.summary_zh: 总统表示，该国将采购 100 万桶石油以增加当前库存。

items.title: Danish PM fails to secure majority in party's weakest election showing since 1903
items.summary: The party, which has been in power since 2019, gained the most votes but faces tough talks on forming a new government.
items.title_zh: 丹麦首相未能在党内自 1903 年以来最弱的选举中获得多数席位
items.summary_zh: 该党自 2019 年以来一直执政，获得了最多选票，但在组建新政府方面面临着艰难的谈判。

items.title: Dozens of bodies, mostly infants, discovered in Kenya mass grave
items.summary: Some of the 32 bodies, including 25 children, are believed to have come from local hospitals and mortuaries.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚万人坑发现数十具尸体，其中大部分是婴儿
items.summary_zh: 据信，32 具尸体中的一些来自当地医院和太平间，其中包括 25 名儿童。

items.title: Talk show host Stephen Colbert to write new Lord of the Rings film
items.summary: Colbert, who is a Tolkien superfan, will adapt an early section of the first Lord of the Rings novel.
items.title_zh: 脱口秀主持人斯蒂芬·科尔伯特将撰写新的《指环王》电影
items.summary_zh: 科尔伯特是托尔金的超级粉丝，他将改编第一部《指环王》小说的早期部分。

items.title: Inside Trump’s Secret Deal to Deport Migrants to Cameroon
items.summary: In Cameroon, the Trump administration found a partner it could pressure into accepting covertly deported migrants.
items.title_zh: 特朗普将移民驱逐到喀麦隆的秘密协议
items.summary_zh: 在喀麦隆，特朗普政府找到了一个可以施压接受秘密驱逐移民的合作伙伴。

items.title: Ukraine Finally Got Battlefield Momentum. Now Comes a Russian Offensive.
items.summary: Moscow’s forces are intensifying their attacks in southern Ukraine after Kyiv made rare gains along the front.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰终于有了战场动力。现在俄罗斯的进攻来了。
items.summary_zh: 在基辅在前线取得罕见进展后，莫斯科军队正在加强对乌克兰南部的攻击。

items.title: Sexual Misconduct Report Leaves I.C.C.’s Path Ahead Unclear
items.summary: In a report obtained by The New York Times, a panel of judges found that evidence of sexual misconduct by the chief prosecutor of the International Criminal Court left room for “reasonable doubt.”
items.title_zh: 性行为不端报告让 I.C.C. 的未来之路不明朗
items.summary_zh: 在《纽约时报》获得的一份报告中，一个法官小组发现，国际刑事法院首席检察官的性行为不当证据存在“合理怀疑”的余地。

items.title: Four Takeaways From Denmark’s Election
items.summary: A desire for change and a fractured political landscape left Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen ahead, but with a tough road to securing a new term.
items.title_zh: 丹麦大选的四个要点
items.summary_zh: 对变革的渴望和分裂的政治格局使总理梅特·弗雷德里克森 (Mette Frederiksen) 遥遥领先，但获得新任期的道路却很艰难。

items.title: Gambia Says the Island Is Cursed. Migrants Saw an Opportunity.
items.summary: Thousands of African migrants hoping to reach Europe have flocked to a remote island in Gambia that local villagers say is protected by a curse.
items.title_zh: 冈比亚称该岛被诅咒了。移民看到了机会。
items.summary_zh: 数千名希望前往欧洲的非洲移民涌向冈比亚的一个偏远岛屿，当地村民称该岛受到了诅咒的保护。

items.title: A Missile Fragment in a Schoolyard
items.summary: Examining an image of children near a missile fragment, which landed near a school as several families were sheltering inside it.
items.title_zh: 校园里的导弹碎片
items.summary_zh: 检查一枚导弹碎片附近儿童的图像，该碎片落在一所学校附近，当时有几个家庭正在里面避难。

items.title: SBI, Sony back Startale’s $63 million push to expand Japan’s tokenized finance stack
items.summary: The Singapore-based company builds blockchain tools for financial firms and retail users, including a blockchain for tokenized securities, stablecoins, and a consumer app.
items.title_zh: SBI 和索尼支持 Startale 斥资 6300 万美元扩大日本代币化金融堆栈
items.summary_zh: 这家总部位于新加坡的公司为金融公司和零售用户构建区块链工具，包括用于代币化证券、稳定币和消费者应用程序的区块链。

items.title: Franklin Templeton puts its $1.7 trillion weight behind Ondo to bring 24/7 stock trading to the blockchain
items.summary: The move expands access to U.S. markets as tokenized securities gain traction among digital investors.
items.title_zh: 富兰克林邓普顿投入 1.7 万亿美元支持 Ondo，将 24/7 股票交易引入区块链
items.summary_zh: 随着代币化证券受到数字投资者的青睐，此举扩大了美国市场的准入。

items.title: Stablecoin startup Payy, focused on private transactions, raises $6 million in seed funding
items.summary: Payy's round was led by FirstMark Capital, an early backer of Airbnb, Shopify and Pinterest, and included Robot Ventures and DBA Crypto.
items.title_zh: 专注于私人交易的稳定币初创公司 Payy 筹集了 600 万美元种子资金
items.summary_zh: Payy 本轮融资由 Airbnb、Shopify 和 Pinterest 的早期支持者 FirstMark Capital 领投，参投方包括 Robot Ventures 和 DBA Crypto。

items.title: Visa takes on Canton Super Validator role, marking major step in engaging with blockchain governance
items.summary: The firm’s application was approved on March 23, three days after it was submitted, appointing Visa the highest Super Validator weight.
items.title_zh: Visa担任广州超级验证者角色，标志着参与区块链治理的重要一步
items.summary_zh: 该公司的申请于 3 月 23 日获得批准，即提交三天后，Visa 成为权重最高的超级验证者。

items.title: Cipher Digital adds third AI lease, lines up $200 million credit facility as CIFR shares rise 10%
items.summary: Cipher is increasingly leaning on debt-backed, flexible financing rather than equity issuance as it scales out its AI infrastructure.
items.title_zh: Cipher Digital 增加第三笔 AI 租赁，随着 CIFR 股价上涨 10%，获得 2 亿美元信贷额度
items.summary_zh: 随着 Cipher 扩展其人工智能基础设施，它越来越依赖债务支持的灵活融资，而不是股票发行。

items.title: Coinbase pushes order book, perps and futures data onchain with Chainlink’s DataLink bridge
items.summary: Onchain protocols and apps will now be able to stream Coinbase's order book and derivatives trading data directly.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 通过 Chainlink 的 DataLink 桥将订单簿、永续合约和期货数据推送到链上
items.summary_zh: 链上协议和应用程序现在将能够直接传输 Coinbase 的订单簿和衍生品交易数据。

items.title: ‘Our interpretation is not an endpoint’: The SEC just clarified its crypto rules, but will they stick?
items.summary: The SEC and CFTC have issued crypto interpretive guidance, but the big question now is whether that clarity has staying power.
items.title_zh: “我们的解释不是终点”：美国证券交易委员会刚刚澄清了其加密货币规则，但它们会坚持下去吗？
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会和美国商品期货交易委员会已经发布了加密货币解释指南，但现在最大的问题是这种明确性是否具有持久力。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: What's New in Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release
items.title_zh: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.
items.title_zh: Lyria 3 Pro：在更多 Google 产品中创建更长的曲目
items.summary_zh: 我们将 Lyria 3 引入专业人士每天工作和创作的工具中。

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.
items.title_zh: 询问技术专家：人工智能如何理解我的视觉搜索？
items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，此外，它现在还可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 如何创造“谦逊”的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院领导的团队正在设计用于医疗诊断的人工智能系统，该系统对于不确定性更具协作性和主动性。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs.
items.title_zh: AI的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。

items.title: Sustaining diplomacy amid competition in US-China relations
items.summary: At MIT, former U.S. ambassador to China Nicholas Burns highlights climate change as an area for diplomatic engagement, while exploring areas including China's emphasis on STEM education.
items.title_zh: 中美关系竞争中的可持续外交
items.summary_zh: 在麻省理工学院，前美国驻华大使尼古拉斯·伯恩斯强调气候变化是外交接触的一个领域，同时探讨了包括中国对 STEM 教育的重视等领域。
